title: Fix PriceTable alignment and full Vietnamese translation
Apply Supabase migrations to hosted project and add service role env
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:\nThe codebase now includes Supabase CLI migrations and Supabase-aware ingestion/read paths, but the current local environment only has public keys. Link the hosted Supabase project, add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY securely to the runtime environment, run migrations on the hosted project, and verify VN/world data flows are reading from the new curated views instead of legacy fallback paths.
notes: Verified the hosted project accepts the provided project secret API key for the Data API and the provided service-role JWT for admin reads, but the remote database still lacks public.commodities and the rest of the curated schema (PGRST205). Supabase CLI cannot link without a Personal Access Token in sbp_* format. Direct db push via db.<project-ref>.supabase.co is blocked in this environment because that hostname resolves only to IPv6 and outbound IPv6 is unreachable here. Direct push via guessed pooler hosts was inconclusive without the exact project region/tenant endpoint. Remaining unblockers: either provide a Supabase Personal Access Token (sbp_*) so the CLI can link and push normally, or run the existing migration from a machine/account that already has Supabase CLI linked to the project.

title: Migrate app data flow to Supabase curated model
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:\nImplement Supabase CLI migrations and seed data based on data-model-supabase-prompt.md, replace file-cache based VN/world price flows with server-side Supabase ingestion and curated read APIs, and remove the current marketplace listing UI while preserving future crowdsource-related schema.

title: Improve color contrast and remove commodity abbreviations
Implement unresolved VN prices dashboard plan
description: Why: implementation_plan.md.resolved describes a dual-source VN agricultural price dashboard, but the current project still serves only world prices and the homepage still uses mock data. What: implement the missing server crawlers/aggregation/history APIs and wire the homepage components to the new /api/vn-prices flow with expandable regional pricing.

title: Connect Vite marketplace to Supabase using env keys
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:\nThe project has Supabase credentials in .env but the Vite client is not connected and marketplace data is still mocked. Implement a Supabase client using the existing env values and wire the marketplace listing read/write flow to Supabase with safe client-side configuration.

title: Improve mobile portrait usability for VN dashboard
description: Why: the user needs the dashboard verified on phone portrait layout, with key actions positioned closer to thumb reach and the interface remaining usable on both desktop and mobile. What: audit the current responsive behavior, reproduce issues at mobile viewport sizes, adjust layout and action placement, then verify the updated UI in portrait mode and desktop mode.

title: Fix NaN change values breaking TopMovers runtime
description: Why: headless browser verification of the VN dashboard found a runtime crash in TopMovers because some crawled rows use '-' for change values, which currently parse to NaN and later serialize to null in the API response. What: sanitize crawler change parsing and harden summary aggregation so live payloads always emit finite numeric change fields.

title: Harden secondary coffee source when giacaphe blocks crawler
description: Why: the VN prices implementation is live, but giacaphe.com currently returns a Cloudflare challenge to server-side requests, so the secondary source remains unavailable in production-like verification. What: evaluate an alternate secondary coffee source or a compliant fetch strategy, then restore true dual-source comparison for coffee regions.

title: Configure automatic GitHub sync workflow
description: Why: the repository currently has no git remote or auto-publish workflow. What: connect this repo to the requested GitHub repository, add a safe auto-push workflow for committed changes, and document a manual sync path for full add/commit/push publishing.

title: Extend Congthuong coverage beyond coffee and heo hoi
description: Why: congthuong.vn is now integrated as a trusted validation source, but the first implementation only covers coffee and live pig prices because those article formats are stable enough to parse reliably. What: evaluate current congthuong.vn article structure for pepper and domestic rice, then add parsers if the content remains consistently machine-readable without introducing fragile scraping logic.
